query: SELECT 'total_leads' as tipo, COUNT(*) as contagem FROM leads UNION ALL SELECT 'leads_teste', COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead Batch%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead Rank%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C0 %' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C1 %' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C2 %' OR nome REGEXP '^Lead C[0-9]' UNION ALL SELECT 'leads_com_corretor_teste', COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor 2');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT 'total_leads' as tipo, COUNT(*) as contagem FROM leads UNION ALL SELECT 'leads_teste', COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead Batch%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead Rank%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C0 %' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C1 %' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C2 %' OR nome REGEXP '^Lead C[0-9]' UNION ALL SELECT 'leads_com_corretor_teste', COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor 2');
